title: "MCP Tool Schema" version: 3.6.0 tool_count: 25 generated_at: "auto"

MCP Tool Schema (v3.6.0)

Mnemosyne exposes 25 MCP tools for memory management, retrieval, and diagnostics.

1. mnemosyne_remember

Store a durable memory

ParameterTypeRequired
contentstringyes
importancefloatno (default: 0.5)
sourcestringno (default: user)
scopestringno (default: session)
valid_untilstringno (default: )
extract_entitiesboolno (default: false)
extractboolno (default: false)
metadatadictno (default: )
veracitystringno (default: unknown)

2. mnemosyne_recall

Search memories by vector+FTS hybrid ranking

ParameterTypeRequired
querystringyes
limitintno (default: 5)
temporal_weightfloatno (default: 0.0)
query_timestringno (default: )
temporal_halflifefloatno (default: 24)
vec_weightfloatno (default: null)
fts_weightfloatno (default: null)
importance_weightfloatno (default: null)

3. mnemosyne_forget

Permanently delete a memory by ID

ParameterTypeRequired
memory_idstringyes

4. mnemosyne_get

Retrieve a single memory by ID (no search)

ParameterTypeRequired
memory_idstringyes

5. mnemosyne_update

Update content or importance of an existing memory

ParameterTypeRequired
memory_idstringyes
contentstringno (default: )
importancefloatno (default: )

6. mnemosyne_validate

Attest, update, or invalidate a memory (collaborative ownership)

ParameterTypeRequired
memory_idstringyes
actionenum[attest,update,invalidate,delete]yes
validatorstringno (default: )
new_contentstringno (default: )
notestringno (default: )
bankenum[private,surface]no (default: private)

7. mnemosyne_invalidate

Mark a memory as expired/superseded

ParameterTypeRequired
memory_idstringyes
replacement_idstringno (default: )

8. mnemosyne_import

Import memories from JSON file or provider (Hindsight, Mem0)

ParameterTypeRequired
input_pathstringno (default: )
providerstringno (default: )
api_keystringno (default: )
user_idstringno (default: )
agent_idstringno (default: )
base_urlstringno (default: )
dry_runboolno (default: false)
channel_idstringno (default: )
forceboolno (default: false)

9. mnemosyne_export

Export all memories to a JSON file

ParameterTypeRequired
output_pathstringyes

10. mnemosyne_diagnose

PII-safe diagnostics: deps, DB state, vector readiness

No parameters

11. mnemosyne_stats

Memory statistics: working count, episodic count, BEAM tiers

No parameters

12. mnemosyne_sleep

Run consolidation cycle (compress old working memories)

ParameterTypeRequired
all_sessionsboolno (default: false)
dry_runboolno (default: false)

13. mnemosyne_triple_add

Add a fact triple to the knowledge graph

ParameterTypeRequired
subjectstringyes
predicatestringyes
objectstringyes
valid_fromstringno (default: )

14. mnemosyne_triple_query

Query the temporal knowledge graph

ParameterTypeRequired
subjectstringno (default: )
predicatestringno (default: )
objectstringno (default: )

15. mnemosyne_graph_link

Declare a semantic edge between two memories

ParameterTypeRequired
source_idstringyes
target_idstringyes
relationshipstringyes
weightfloatno (default: 0.5)

16. mnemosyne_graph_query

Multi-hop BFS traversal from a seed memory

ParameterTypeRequired
seed_memory_idstringyes
max_hopsintno (default: 2)
edge_typestringno (default: )
min_weightfloatno (default: 0.0)

17. mnemosyne_shared_remember

Store compact cross-agent surface memory

ParameterTypeRequired
contentstringyes
kindstringno (default: meta)
importancefloatno (default: 0.8)
veracitystringno (default: unknown)
metadatadictyes

18. mnemosyne_shared_recall

Search only the shared surface DB

ParameterTypeRequired
querystringyes
limitintno (default: 5)

19. mnemosyne_shared_forget

Delete one working shared-surface memory by ID

ParameterTypeRequired
memory_idstringyes

20. mnemosyne_shared_stats

Return shared surface DB path and counts

No parameters

21. mnemosyne_scratchpad_write

Write a temporary note to the scratchpad

ParameterTypeRequired
contentstringyes

22. mnemosyne_scratchpad_read

Read the scratchpad entries

No parameters

23. mnemosyne_scratchpad_clear

Clear all scratchpad entries

No parameters

24. mnemosyne_remember_canonical

Store an owner-scoped canonical fact (single source of truth)

ParameterTypeRequired
contentstringyes
importancefloatno (default: 0.5)
veracitystringno (default: unknown)
sourcestringno (default: user)
valid_untilstringno (default: )

25. mnemosyne_recall_canonical

Recall canonical facts by slot, category, or substring

ParameterTypeRequired
slotstringno (default: )
categorystringno (default: )
substringstringno (default: )
limitintno (default: 5)
include_historyboolno (default: false)
